title: Jamaican Crumble Oat Bars
description: A twist on a classic crumble bar, with a hint of Jamaican spice and a gooey, sweet center.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine oats, sour cream, jamaican rum, raisins, and brown sugar. Mix until a dough forms.
Press the dough into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and crumble topping.
Add eggs and vanilla extract to the crumble mixture and mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the oat mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the center is set.
Let cool completely before cutting into bars.
